target: Test Completion Rate Feature on Question Bank Page
summary: Verified new Test Completion Rate feature. Backend APIs POST /api/user/track-completion and GET /api/user/{user_id}/completion-stats work correctly. Frontend displays 5th stat box showing 'X/20 Completed' with progress bar, clickable to expand breakdown panel showing Cambridge (X/8), AI Academic (X/8), AI General (X/4). Panel dismisses via X button.

features_tested.details: Successfully tracks cambridge, ai_academic, ai_general categories
Same user_id+test_id+category combination updates existing record
Returns cambridge, ai_academic, ai_general with completed/total counts

features_tested.feature: Frontend 5th stat box shows X/20 Completed
features_tested.details: Shows '6/20' with progress bar in Question Bank header

features_tested.feature: Frontend clicking completion box toggles breakdown panel
Frontend breakdown shows Cambridge X/8, AI Academic X/8, AI General X/4
features_tested.details: Panel shows all three categories with progress bars

features_tested.feature: Frontend breakdown dismissible via X button
features_tested.details: X button closes the breakdown panel

seed_data_creation: Existing seed data includes 1 Cambridge (ielts17_test1) and 1 AI Academic (academic_set_a_01) completion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Completion tracking feature fully working. Backend tracks completions in user_completions collection. Full test mode automatically saves completions when user_id is provided. Cambridge tests call track-completion on finish. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_completion_tracking.py for regression testing.
